ClientSideComponent.Name: Table Viewer
ClientSideComponent.ComponentManifest: {"id":"04eebb40-018f-4be0-8309-ff70ed83b5bc","alias":"TableViewer-listviewer","componentType":"WebPart","supportsThemeVariants":true,"version":"1.0.0","manifestVersion":2,"supportsFullBleed":true,"supportedHosts":["SharePointWebPart"],"preconfiguredEntries":[{"groupId":"5c03119e-3074-46fd-976b-c60198311f70","group":{"default":"Table Viewer Custom"},"title":{"default":"Table Viewer"},"description":{"default":"The Table Viewer web part is used to query data in SharePoint Lists using View XML based queries and combine that data with a Handlebars template, render the resulting HTML to the page. It included People hover Table, Openign in the side panel and Action Logging"},"officeFabricIconFontName":"TableComputed","properties":{"siteUrl":"","JSONCode":"","list":"","view":"","viewXmlCode":"","title":"","showTitle":false,"showFind":false,"contentHeight":"500px","webPartTag":""}}],"loaderConfig":{"internalModuleBaseUrls":["HTTPS://SPCLIENTSIDEASSETLIBRARY/"],"entryModuleId":"plre-listviewer-webpart","scriptResources":{"plre-listviewer-webpart":{"type":"path","path":"plre-listviewer-webpart_9fb31dc415444ddbde3a.js"},"@microsoft/sp-property-pane":{"type":"component","id":"f9e737b7-f0df-4597-ba8c-3060f82380db","version":"1.18.2"},"@microsoft/sp-component-base":{"type":"component","id":"467dc675-7cc5-4709-8aac-78e3b71bd2f6","version":"1.18.2"},"@microsoft/sp-loader":{"type":"component","id":"1c6c9123-7aac-41f3-a376-3caea41ed83f","version":"1.11.0"},"ControlStrings":{"type":"localizedPath","paths":{"bg-BG":"ControlStrings_bg-bg_ce46c4e4199aca6926736455e53d7802.js","ca-ES":"ControlStrings_ca-es_48e39fc03c712737bf52be5b27d866ff.js","da-DK":"ControlStrings_da-dk_a401749bde83009b82d0afc4f1901be9.js","de-DE":"ControlStrings_de-de_fe2b107867878cfdd127828b522bfa7a.js","el-GR":"ControlStrings_el-gr_411b07380ae6171470eeb5a7ac7554df.js","en-US":"ControlStrings_en-us_923f2b7219da3068a6a74cb1e61bf04c.js","es-ES":"ControlStrings_es-es_c44b8fb3af0c06d842e8c2bd06ee407b.js","et-EE":"ControlStrings_et-ee_26983e754decbda62ad3177a179a9b3f.js","eu-ES":"ControlStrings_eu-es_511321cb9b07e1ffa35c0ea620681a6b.js","fi-FI":"ControlStrings_fi-fi_9060a1a0432a3244295cf28967944550.js","fr-CA":"ControlStrings_fr-ca_9e91defb5aff9abdd2c7e0f44807d766.js","fr-FR":"ControlStrings_fr-fr_40fa102c9335efffa23417356a2adf38.js","it-IT":"ControlStrings_it-it_cc95c98993fa14b51472fa8e70a24429.js","ja-JP":"ControlStrings_ja-jp_e7c443bf0dd0b8466d886c796a41cd96.js","lt-LT":"ControlStrings_lt-lt_679c8ccff037a97c54ea3de57e47f3c4.js","lv-LV":"ControlStrings_lv-lv_3b2315d9c10bddd1bb22bc10b045fab4.js","nb-NO":"ControlStrings_nb-no_095169ef17b8583f335d5531fd81ecef.js","nl-NL":"Control
